title: Add New Relic Domain to CSP Allowlist
description: Add the New Relic JavaScript agent domain (`js-agent.newrelic.com`) to the Content Security Policy (CSP) allowlist so the New Relic browser monitoring agent can load without CSP violations.
acceptance_criteria: js-agent.newrelic.com is added to the CSP script-src directive
New Relic browser monitoring agent loads without CSP errors
No other CSP directives are weakened
middleware_changes: CSP middleware updated to include js-agent.newrelic.com in the script-src directive.
implementation_notes: New Relic domain was already added to the staging CSP. Production CSP update would apply when staging changes are merged to production.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the domain was already added on staging and would take effect on production after the next merge.
